/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags   -o ../bin/kf6/ktexteditor/jenovaktext.so CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/jenovaktext_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/plugin/AiPlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/plugin/AiPluginView.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/config/AiConfigPage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/network/LlamaClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/context/ContextManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/ui/AiChatWidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/jenovaktext.dir/completion/AiCompletionModel.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,::::::::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libKF6TextEditor.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6SyntaxHighlighting.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Parts.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6XmlGui.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigWidgets.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Completion.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ColorScheme.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6GuiAddons.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigGui.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6WidgetsAddons.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOCore.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.27.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Xml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
